name: law firm administrators processing 5–15 legal documents/month tool
description: For law firm administrators processing 5–15 legal documents/month, inefficient manual signature collection causes delays in client onboarding. We automate the signature process instead of manual signature collection via email or physical documents.
target_audience: law firm administrators processing 5–15 legal documents/month
